name: @sadhaka/loom-engine
description: Browser-first 2D / 2.5D game engine. Canvas2D, ECS, render-graph stages, Director-bridge SSE integration. Built from scratch in TypeScript for TheWorldTable.ai.

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:demos
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist demo/*.js demo/*.js.map demo/*/main.js demo/*/main.js.map
scripts.test: tsx --test tests/smoke.test.ts tests/world.test.ts tests/asset-loader.test.ts tests/animation.test.ts tests/vfx.test.ts tests/audio-input.test.ts tests/director.test.ts tests/combat.test.ts tests/projectile.test.ts tests/arpg.test.ts tests/snapshot-recovery.test.ts tests/touch-input.test.ts tests/webgl2-device.test.ts tests/multiplayer.test.ts tests/zone-event-envelope.test.ts tests/mock-zone-bridge.test.ts tests/zone-event-system.test.ts tests/zone-state-resource.test.ts tests/ai-plugin-registry.test.ts tests/ai-plugin-error-isolation.test.ts tests/mock-ai-plugin.test.ts tests/plugin-context.test.ts tests/spatial-audio-bus.test.ts tests/audio-listener-resource.test.ts tests/spatial-audio-system.test.ts tests/spatial-falloff-math.test.ts tests/audio-asset-cache.test.ts tests/audio-asset-loader.test.ts tests/cue-catalog.test.ts tests/music-director.test.ts tests/cue-stop-all.test.ts tests/zone-audio-system.test.ts tests/zone-boss-entity-resource.test.ts tests/zone-boss-entity-system.test.ts tests/headless-tick-harness.test.ts tests/trace-replay/replay.test.ts tests/entropy.test.ts

author: Misha Mitiev
